item.title: 玩客云casaos线刷包下载
item.description: # 玩客云casaos线刷包 ## 刷机完之后即可使用casaos [Armbian_by-SilentWind_24.5.0-trunk_Onecloud_jammy_legacy_5.9.0-rc7_minimal.burn.img](https://github.com/luyuanbo79/luyuanbo/releases/download/%E7%8E%A9%E5%AE%A2%E4%BA%91casaos%E5%9B%BA%E4%BB%B6/Armbian_by-SilentWind_24.5.0-trunk_Onecloud_jammy_legacy_5.9.0-rc7_minimal.burn.img)。
